description: Korea's only independent wafer prober manufacturer. World's #3 wafer prober maker after Tokyo Seimitsu and TEL. Supplies Samsung Electronics for 15+ years. 240 employees, revenue 179.8B KRW (2024). Innovative 'apartment-type' stacked prober achieves 670% cleanroom efficiency improvement. Target: 2T KRW revenue by 2030.

majorClients: Samsung Electronics (CMP-0018) - wafer probers (15+ year relationship)
competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - direct competitor, world #1 prober (46% share)
MPI Corporation (CMP-0071) - Taiwan prober maker (10% share)
_externalRelationships.notes: Private company, not publicly listed. World's #3 prober maker. Revenue 179.8B KRW (2024). Apartment-type stacked prober design fits 12 probers in the footprint of 2 conventional probers, 670% cleanroom efficiency. Key domestic Korean competitor to Accretech. Target IPO possible. Relationship with Samsung spans 15+ years. Key differentiator: space efficiency innovation addresses cleanroom cost pressure.

_metadata.dataSource: SEMICS corporate site, MaeilBusiness, ZDNet Korea, Korean semiconductor industry sources
